analyzed_query:
WITH customer_total_return AS (SELECT sr_customer_sk
ctr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk ctr_store_sk, sum(sr_fee) ctr_total_return FROM
tpcds.store_returns, tpcds.date_dim WHERE sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk AND
d_year = CAST(2000 AS INT) GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk) SELECT
c_customer_id FROM customer_total_return ctr1, tpcds.store, tpcds.customer LEFT
SEMI JOIN (SELECT avg(ctr_total_return) * CAST(1.2 AS DECIMAL(2,1)),
ctr2.ctr_store_sk FROM customer_total_return ctr2 GROUP BY ctr2.ctr_store_sk)
`$a$1` (`$c$1`, `$c$2`) ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = `$a$1`.`$c$2` AND
ctr1.ctr_total_return > `$a$1`.`$c$1` WHERE TRUE AND s_store_sk =
ctr1.ctr_store_sk AND s_state = 'TN' AND ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC LIMIT CAST(100 AS TINYINT)
